name: My Little Fungus Au
description:
My Little Fungus Au

Description

My Little Fungus takes place during a catastrophic fungal outbreak known as Neointeria, a magically-reactive mold that infects ponies, wildlife, the environment, and even magical artifacts. What begins as a minor allergy outbreak quickly escalates into a kingdom-wide collapse, forcing Princess Twilight Sparkle, her friends, and the remaining Equestrian leadership into a desperate struggle to contain the infection before all of Equestria is lost.

The AU follows the scientific progression of the fungus, the horrifying transformation stages, multiple mutations, political instability, character deterioration, and the emotional fallout between the Mane Six and the Princesses. Everypony suffers. No one is untouched.

Credit/Info

This AU/Scenario was made by marmar.the.imp on TikTok.
creator: KwispyVeil
